Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NAJARIAN LOANS, INC'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. Appearances: Patrick Solomonian of the Law Offices of Patrick Solomonian (949.712.7199) appearing telephonically for plaintiff and responding party; David E. Harris (925.935.9400) for defendant and responding party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: moving party's request for fees denied. Moving party's request for costs in the amount of $1,648.30 granted. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
